data.content: Root cause: scene/take flow could attempt kno claim from active states, causing claim failures like ready_for_* skill errors and leaving beats stuck in action states. Also regroom only treated closed children as terminal, so shipped/abandoned children did not auto-close parents. Fixes: (1) terminal-manager now auto-advances agent-owned active states via kno next before claim checks and take-loop re-claims; (2) parent child filtering excludes closed/shipped/abandoned; (3) regroom treats closed/shipped/abandoned as terminal and supports upward cascade. Validation: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, NODE_ENV=production bun run build.
